violations.text: An accumulation of ice was observed on the freezer. Contamination must be prevented during storage of food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Utensils were observed stored in sanitizer between uses. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
Prep unit #1 and #2 located in the front counter area were not in good repair. An accumulation of water was observed in the inside. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The produce refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
The condensate from the ice machine is draining outside into the ground. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The prep sink and ice machine are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Chicken and salmon were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit in prep unit #1. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hot eggs were observed stored over the chicken and salmon about a half hour prior to inspection. Salmon and chicken were relocated to rapidly cool. Establishment must not cool/store food over the food in the prep unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Deli meats were observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit in prep unit #2. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, deli meat had been placed in the prep unit about 15 minutes prior to inspection. Deli meats were relocated to another refrigeration unit to rapidly cool. Deli meats were observed stored over the fill line. Establishment must not store food over the fill line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Lettuce was observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, lettuce had been on the counter for about 30 minutes. Lettuce was relocated to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Establishment must keep lettuce refrigerated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
An accumulation of ice was observed on the freezer. Contamination must be prevented during storage of food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The produce refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Prep unit #1 and #2 located in the front counter area was not in good repair. An accumulation of water was observed in the inside. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The condensate from the ice machine is draining outside into the ground. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025

The sink used for food preparation and ice machine are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was moved to ware washing area to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
